name: second-opinions
description: Validate decisions with gpt-5.4-codex via GitHub Copilot CLI. Use for critical code reviews, design decisions, and pre-merge validation.

interface.shortDescription: Validate decisions with gpt-5.4-codex via GitHub Copilot CLI. Use for critical code reviews, design decisions, and pre-merge validation.
interface.longDescription: Validate decisions with gpt-5.4-codex via GitHub Copilot CLI. Use for critical code reviews, design decisions, and pre-merge validation. Works well in repo-local and Codex cloud workflows that operate on a checked-out repository.
defaultPrompt: Get a second opinion on this implementation or design decision and summarize the strongest agreement, disagreement, and actionable feedback.
